docs.title: Dynamic Alerting Platform
docs.text:
Language / 語言： 中文 (Current) | English

Config-driven 多租戶告警平台，基於 Prometheus group_left 向量匹配。規則數量固定為 O(M)，不隨租戶數增長——租戶只寫 YAML，不碰 PromQL。

100 租戶：5,000 條手寫規則 → 237 條固定規則。 新租戶分鐘級導入，變更秒級生效。

docs.title: 按角色快速入門
docs.text:
• :material-rocket: Platform Engineer

    部署與運維平台。開始 →

    HA 架構、Helm 整合、Prometheus/Alertmanager 路由。

  • :material-database: Domain Expert

    定義監控標準。開始 →

    Rule Pack、基線探索、客製化治理。

  • :material-account-multiple: Tenant

    導入並配置閾值。開始 →

    da-tools scaffold、YAML 配置、零 PromQL。

不確定角色？試試 Getting Started Wizard。

docs.title: 運作原理
docs.text:
傳統做法 (❌)Dynamic Alerting (✅) 
# 每個租戶 = 獨立規則 — 100 租戶 × 50 規則 = 5,000 條表達式
- alert: MySQLHighConnections_db-a
  expr: mysql_global_status_threads_connected{namespace="db-a"} > 100
- alert: MySQLHighConnections_db-b
  expr: mysql_global_status_threads_connected{namespace="db-b"} > 80
# ... 每個租戶重複一次

# 1 條規則透過 group_left 匹配覆蓋所有租戶
- alert: MariaDBHighConnections
  expr: |
    tenant:mysql_threads_connected:max
    > on(tenant) group_left
    tenant:alert_threshold:connections

# 租戶只需宣告閾值（YAML，零 PromQL）：
tenants:
  db-a: { mysql_connections: "100" }
  db-b: { mysql_connections: "80" }

docs.title: 架構總覽
docs.text:
graph TB
    A["租戶配置\n(conf.d/*.yaml)"] -->|per-tenant threshold| B["threshold-exporter\n(×2 HA)"]
    B -->|"Prometheus metric\n(tenant:alert_threshold:*)"| C["Prometheus\n(15 Rule Packs)"]
    C -->|group_left matching| D["Alert Rules\n(固定數量)"]
    D -->|AlertGroup| E["Alertmanager"]
    E -->|dynamic route| F["Receivers\nwebhook/email/slack/teams"]

    G["Config-driven\nRouting"] -->|YAML| E
    H["三態模式\n(Normal/Silent/Maintenance)"] -->|suppress| D

    style A fill:#e8f5e9
    style B fill:#fff3e0
    style C fill:#e3f2fd
    style D fill:#f3e5f5
    style E fill:#fce4ec
    style F fill:#e0f2f1

詳細架構見 架構與設計。效能數據見 基準測試。

docs.title: 核心指標
docs.text: 指標 傳統方案（100 租戶） Dynamic Alerting 規則數量 5,000+（隨租戶線性增長） 237（固定，O(M)） 新租戶導入 1–3 天 < 5 分鐘 Prometheus 記憶體 ~600MB+ ~154MB 規則評估時間 隨租戶線性增長 60ms（2 或 102 租戶皆同） 租戶所需知識 PromQL + Alertmanager 配置 YAML 閾值設定

docs.title: 平台能力
docs.text:
規則引擎： O(M) 複雜度（group_left 向量匹配）· 15 個 Rule Pack Projected Volume 獨立部署 · Severity Dedup via Alertmanager Inhibit（ADR-001）

租戶管理： 三態模式（Normal/Silent/Maintenance）· 四層路由合併（ADR-007）· 排程式閾值與維護窗口 · Schema Validation · Cardinality Guard

工具鏈： da-tools CLI（scaffold → migrate → validate → cutover → diagnose）· CLI 參考 · 速查表

部署層級： Tier 1（Git-Native / GitOps）或 Tier 2（Portal + API，含 RBAC）。對比詳見 README。

docs.title: 文件導覽
docs.text:
文件 適用角色 主題 架構與設計 Platform Engineer 核心設計、HA、Rule Pack 遷移指南 DevOps, Tenant 導入流程、AST 引擎 治理與安全 合規、主管 三層治理模型、審計 基準測試 Platform Engineer 效能數據與方法論 整合指南 Platform Engineer BYO Prometheus · BYO Alertmanager · Federation · GitOps · VCS Rule Packs All 15 個規則包 + Alert 速查 場景指南 All 9 個實戰場景 疑難排解 All 常見問題與解法

完整文件對照表：doc-map.md · 工具表：tool-map.md

docs.title: Changelog
docs.text: All notable changes to the Dynamic Alerting Integrations project will be documented in this file.

docs.title: Security
docs.text:
• Grafana 12.4.1 → 12.4.2（v2.8.0, #98 of umbrella #100 Q2 2026 CVE audit） — bump k8s/03-monitoring/deployment-grafana.yaml。audit prerequisite confirmed：configmap-grafana.yaml 唯一 data source 是 Prometheus，無 PostgreSQL，故 12.4.1 帶的 pgx/v5 CVE-2026-33816（CRITICAL memory-safety, fixed in 5.9.0）在我們部署是 dead-code。bump 主要修 12.4.1 → 12.4.2 自身的 Go binary CVE（含 grpc CVE-2026-33186 transitive）。Trivy 0.70.0 audit：Go binary 部分 8/2 → 7/1（pgx 那條 CRITICAL 即使可達也已被 12.4.2 fix）。殘留 11 HIGH + 2 CRITICAL Alpine OS layer（OpenSSL/libssl3/musl/zlib）upstream Grafana 還沒 rebase Alpine 3.22+，CRITICAL CVE-2026-31789 是 32-bit only（amd64 N/A），HIGH OpenSSL CMS path 在 Grafana 不啟用 — 留 issue 追 upstream rebase。詳見 #100 audit 摘要。

  • Prometheus + Alertmanager stack bump（v2.8.0, #96 + #97 of umbrella #100 Q2 2026 CVE audit） — bump 4 處 image refs 對齊 prom/ monitoring stack：k8s/03-monitoring/deployment-prometheus.yaml v3.10.0 → v3.11.2、k8s/03-monitoring/deployment-alertmanager.yaml v0.31.1 → v0.32.0、tests/e2e-bench/docker-compose.yml 的 prometheus v2.55.0 → v3.11.2（Prometheus 2.x 已 EOL 2024-12-03）+ alertmanager v0.27.0 → v0.32.0。Trivy 0.70.0 audit 2026-04-26：清掉 grpc CVE-2026-33186（CRITICAL memory-safety）+ Go stdlib 1.25.7 / 1.26.0 → 1.26.2 升級涵蓋的全部 CVE-2026-32280/281/283 等 + e2e-bench 那組 v2.55.0 帶的 11 個 stdlib CVE（Go 1.23.2 → 1.26.2）+ x/crypto CVE-2024-45337（CRITICAL SSH misuse, fixed in v0.31.0）。Prometheus k8s 9 HIGH + 1 CRITICAL → 3 HIGH + 0 CRITICAL（殘留 jsonparser/moby authz/otel BSD-only，皆不可達）；Alertmanager k8s 6 HIGH + 1 CRITICAL → 1 HIGH + 0 CRITICAL（殘留 otel-go kenv path 是 BSD-only）。e2e-bench compose 改 v3.x 後 18 HIGH + 3 CRITICAL → 3 HIGH + 0 CRITICAL（同 k8s 殘留）。注意*：Prometheus 2.x → 3.x 是 major bump，但本 PR 用到的 flags（--config.file、--web.enable-lifecycle、--storage.tsdb.retention.time）都仍向下相容；現有 prometheus.yml / alert-rules.yml 格式無 breaking change。詳見 #100 audit 摘要。

  • oauth2-proxy v7.7.1/v7.15.1 → v7.15.2（v2.8.0, #92 of umbrella #100 Q2 2026 CVE audit） — bump 5 個 image references 對齊到單一版本：k8s/04-tenant-api/deployment.yaml（從 v7.7.1 跳兩個 minor）、helm/da-portal/values{,-tier1,-tier2}.yaml 與 helm/tenant-api/values.yaml（從 v7.15.1）。clear 三條 auth bypass：CVE-2026-34457（CRITICAL：health-check User-Agent matching 繞 auth_request mode）、CVE-2026-40575（CRITICAL：X-Forwarded-Uri header spoofing）、GHSA-pxq7-h93f-9jrg（HIGH：fragment confusion in skip_auth_routes）。Trivy 0.70.0 audit 2026-04-26：v7.7.1 帶 16 HIGH + 6 CRITICAL（含早期 CVE-2025-54576 fixed in 7.11.0）、v7.15.1 帶 6 HIGH + 2 CRITICAL；target v7.15.2 在 trivy 上 0 / 0 clean（Debian 13.4 + go binary 全乾淨）。修掉 v7.7.1 vs v7.15.1 的 inter-file drift。詳見 #100 audit 摘要。

  • alpine/git init container 2.43.0 → v2.52.0（v2.8.0, #93 of umbrella #100 Q2 2026 CVE audit） — bump tenant-api init container 在 k8s/04-tenant-api/deployment.yaml + helm/tenant-api/templates/deployment.yaml。clear 8 個 git binary CVE 含 4 個 RCE/exfil class：CVE-2024-32002（CRITICAL recursive-clone RCE）、CVE-2024-32004（local clone RCE）、CVE-2024-32021（symlink bypass）、CVE-2024-32465（local RCE）、CVE-2024-52006（credential exfil via newline confusion）、CVE-2025-46334、CVE-2025-48384（RCE）、CVE-2025-48385（arbitrary file write）。Trivy 0.70.0 audit：current 32 HIGH + 4 CRITICAL → target 13 HIGH + 2 CRITICAL（殘留全是 Alpine 3.23.3 OS layer，但 init container 只 clone 受信任內網 GitOps repo，OpenSSL DoS / CMS 殘留 CVE 不可達）。詳見 #100 audit 摘要。

  • Python base image 3.13.3 → 3.13.13-alpine3.22（v2.8.0, #94 of umbrella #100 Q2 2026 CVE audit） — bump components/da-tools/app/Dockerfile（builder + runtime）+ tests/e2e-bench/driver/Dockerfile（順手把 floating python:3.13-alpine 釘到 explicit version 取得 reproducibility）。Trivy 0.70.0 audit 2026-04-26：current python:3.13.3-alpine3.22 帶 15 HIGH + 5 CRITICAL（含 CVE-2025-15467 OpenSSL pre-auth RCE、CVE-2025-6965 sqlite integer truncation、CVE-2025-48174/48175 libavif、CVE-2026-31789 OpenSSL heap overflow on 32-bit）；target image 在 trivy 上 0 / 0 clean（Alpine 3.22.4 patched + Python 3.13.13 stdlib fixes）。da-tools Dockerfile 既有的 RUN apk --no-cache upgrade 仍保留作 defense-in-depth。詳見 #100 audit 摘要。

  • Go toolchain 1.26.1 → 1.26.2（v2.8.0, #95 of umbrella #100 Q2 2026 CVE audit） — bump 三份 go.mod (components/tenant-api、components/threshold-exporter/app、tests/e2e-bench/receiver) + 對應 3 份 Dockerfile 從 floating golang:1.26-alpine 釘到 golang:1.26.2-alpine3.22。一次清掉 10 個 stdlib CVE：CVE-2026-33810（Go 1.26 only x509 wildcard bypass）、CVE-2026-27140（cmd/go SWIG cgo trust-layer bypass，build-time RCE）、CVE-2026-32289（html/template XSS）、CVE-2026-32282（os.Root.Chmod symlink traversal）、CVE-2026-32283（TLS 1.3 key-update DoS）、CVE-2026-32280/32281（crypto/x509 DoS）、CVE-2026-32288（archive/tar unbounded allocation）、CVE-2026-27143/27144（cmd/compile memory corruption + type confusion）。Trivy 0.70.0 audit 2026-04-26 confirm。詳見 #100 audit 摘要。

docs.title: Fixed
docs.text: • CLAUDE.md L57 stale ref to doc-map.md § Change Impact Matrix（#66 part 2） — 該章節從未存在於 doc-map.md（auto-generated catalog，無 manual section）。移除 parenthetical 連結；保留主規範文字「影響 API / schema / CLI / 計數的變更須同步 CHANGELOG.md + CLAUDE.md + README.md」自身已完整。#66 另一半（tool-count drift 121 vs actual 122）已於 PR #71 一併修。#66 可 close

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
• doc-map scope 收窄為公開文件，docs/internal/** 不再 catalog（v2.8.0, #66 follow-up） — generate_doc_map.py SKIP_DIRS + _version_patterns.py DOC_MAP_SKIP_DIRS 同步加入 internal。理由：catalog 真正的 consumer 是「快速查找公開文件」（AI agent / 開發者 discovery）；internal docs 的 discovery path 是 CLAUDE.md / skills / vibe-playbook-nav，不需要 catalog 重複登錄。修掉這個 scope 不一致也順手清掉 validate_docs_versions.py 對 v2.8.0-{planning-archive,tech-debt-decomposition}.md 的 false-positive doc-map-coverage warning（產生器故意排除但驗證器不知道）。doc-map 從 134 → 114 entries；公開文件 count 在 CLAUDE.md L83 + README.md 對應行同步更新並改用「公開文件」措辭以反映 scope 收窄。catalog 自描述的 doc-map.md / tool-map.md meta-entries 仍由 SELF_ENTRIES 手動加入，不受影響

  • GitHub Actions Node 20 → Node 24 sweep（v2.8.0, chore） — 升級全部 11 個 workflow 用到的 7 個 actions 到當前最新 stable major，避開 2026-06-02 GitHub 強制 Node 24 deadline + 26 週後 Node 20 移除：actions/checkout@v4 → @v6（11 處）、actions/setup-python@v5 → @v6（6 處）、actions/setup-go@v5 → @v6（3 處）、actions/setup-node@v4 → @v6（3 處，確認 repo 未用 yarn/pnpm cache 故 v6「limit auto-cache to npm」breaking 不影響）、actions/cache@v4 → @v5、actions/upload-artifact@v4 → @v7、actions/github-script@v7 → @v9（確認 repo 3 個 inline script 全使用 require('fs') + injected github.rest.*，未踩到 v9 移除的 require('@actions/github') 路徑）。74 個 reference 全替換；diff 嚴格只動 version tag 不動其他語意。verification path：本 PR 自身 CI run（trigger 多數 PR-level workflow）+ post-merge gh workflow run bench-record.yaml、mkdocs-deploy.yaml 手動 dispatch（cron/push-only workflow）

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
• Phase .b — Track C: B-6 Tenant API hardening (route C strict-plan closure plan Track C)（v2.8.0） — 把 v2.7.0 出貨的 tenant-api 補上「客戶導入前」的三個 production gap：速率限制、X-Request-ID 回應標頭 echo、以及 Groups/Views/Task/PR 端點的 tenant-scoped authz。Spike-first 流程確認 v2.7.0 已具備標準 chi 中介層 + RBAC 框架，scope 從原 plan 五項收斂為四項（其中 C4 deferred 至 issue #134）。零 production 邏輯破壞，全部以 unit tests 守關。
  • PR-1 C1 — Rate limit middleware (components/tenant-api/internal/handler/middleware.go)：homegrown sliding window 80 LoC（不引入第三方依賴 httprate / x/time/rate）。Per-caller 100 req/min default；逾限回 429 + Retry-After + JSON {error, code: "RATE_LIMITED", retry_after_s}。Caller identity 優先序 X-Forwarded-Email → X-Real-IP → RemoteAddr IP（與 rbac.Middleware 一致）。/health//ready//metrics 預設豁免（kube-probe 不燒 budget）。TA_RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN=0 完全停用；非數值 fallback 預設並 startup log。allow() 用 caller-supplied now 不用 wall-clock — 確保 deterministic 測試（self-review 抓到原 implementation 用 time.Until 在測試模擬時鐘下會產生 retry-after = 1s 而非 30s 的 bug）
  • PR-1 C3 — RequestIDResponse middleware：chi middleware.RequestID 只把 ID 注入 context 不回應；新 middleware mount 在 RequestID 之後，把 middleware.GetReqID(ctx) 寫進 X-Request-ID 回應 header。Customer 端的 correlation ID round-trip 也覆蓋；context 缺值時 defensive no-op 不 crash
  • PR-1 tests (middleware_test.go)：15 cases — RequestIDResponse 三場景 (echo / round-trip / no-op-on-empty) + RateLimit 七場景 (under-cap / at-cap-429 / per-caller isolation / skip-paths / disabled-when-zero / fallback-to-IP / sliding-window-eviction) + 5 cases for RateLimitConfigFromEnv (default / positive / zero / malformed / negative)
  • PR-2 C2 — Tenant-scoped authz on 4 endpoints (components/tenant-api/internal/handler/authz.go + edits to group.go / task.go / pr.go)：(a) PutGroup / DeleteGroup 必須對每個 member tenant 持 PermWrite；缺者全列入 403 訊息（不是 first-only — 同 PR ergonomics 原則 with PR-2 的 forbidden-tenant 列表）；(b) GetTask 過濾 Results[] 為 caller 可讀子集，零可讀子集回 403（task 存在但 caller 無權 — 不是 404）；(c) ListPRs bulk mode 過濾不可讀 tenant；?tenant=<id> mode 不可讀回空列表而非 403（避免 tenant-existence oracle）。Views 不在範圍 — Filters 是 arbitrary metadata 不是 tenant ID list，無對應 RBAC 對象
  • PR-2 tests (authz_test.go)：14 cases — tenantsLackingPermission helper 7 cases (empty / open-mode-read / open-mode-write-rejects-all / read-but-not-write / partial-access / dedup / skip-empty) + PutGroup / DeleteGroup 3 forbidden-member cases + GetTask 2 (filtered / 403-on-zero-access) + ListPRs 2 (bulk-filter / forbidden-?tenant-empty-not-403)
  • 新文件 docs/api/tenant-api-hardening.{md,en.md} — customer-facing 雙語 6-section guide：規格 + 配置 + caller identity 優先序 + 設計選擇（為何 homegrown）+ tenant-scoped authz 受影響端點 + open-mode 行為對 writes 的影響 + upgrade rollout 4-stage matrix + 已知 gap (5.1 → issue #134) + cross-refs。Public docs 117 → 118
  • Open-mode 行為設計選擇：no _rbac.yaml deployed 時 PermRead granted 全 tenants 但 PermWrite denied — 讓 PR-2 的新 tenant-scoped check 在 dev/pre-prod 環境一律擋下 writes。Production hardening 不該因為 operator 忘了 deploy _rbac.yaml 而退化為「人人可寫」。3 existing tests (TestPutGroup_Create / TestPutGroup_Update / TestDeleteGroup_Success) 改用新 helper permissiveRBACManager(t) 注入 groups: [{name: platform-admins, tenants: ["*"], permissions: [admin]}] 顯式授權，符合「test 不應 rely on open mode 默允許 write」的契約
  • 不在本 bundle scope（明示 follow-up）：(a) C4 body-content range validation → issue #134（go-playground/validator + struct tags 在邊界 fail-fast，sized 1.5-2 工作日，獨立 PR 較乾淨）；(b) Server-level timeout / body-size 移到 Helm value（Track C 不擴此 surface — 預設值合理）；(c) SSE client idle timeout（解耦於 RBAC / rate limit，獨立 SSE-specific hardening 路徑）

  • Track C status：planning §12.5 「Phase B closure plan tracks」Track C ⬜ → 🟢；下輪 = Track D (staging build, 5-6 週 wall-clock — 卡 staging 形態 i/ii/iii 拍板) / Track E (customer-anon — unbounded waiting) / Track F (rehearser — block on E)

  • Phase .c — C-10 batch-pr customer CLI surface (Bundle A — pays down PR #131 deferred-scope debt)（v2.8.0） — wires the just-shipped da-batchpr Go binary into the customer-facing da-tools Python wrapper + the static-binary install path. PR #131 explicitly deferred 4 follow-ups; this bundle ships them coherently:

  • scripts/tools/ops/batchpr_dispatch.py (new ~250 lines) — Python wrapper mirroring guard_dispatch.py pattern. 3 subcommands (apply / refresh / refresh-source) validated then forwarded to the binary. Critical contract difference vs guard_dispatch: da-batchpr itself takes subcommands at the binary boundary (cmd/da-batchpr/main.go switches on os.Args[1]), so the subcommand string IS preserved in forward_args (guard_dispatch strips it because da-guard has no inner subcommand). Binary resolution: --da-batchpr-binary <path> → $DA_BATCHPR_BINARY env → da-batchpr on $PATH → friendly install hint
  • components/da-tools/app/entrypoint.py — COMMAND_MAP entry "batch-pr": "batchpr_dispatch.py" + bilingual help text section ("Batch PR — C-10 Migration Batch PR Pipeline, v2.8.0")
  • docs/cli-reference.{md,en.md} — full batch-pr section: usage / 3 subcommands / binary resolution / per-subcommand flag tables (apply / refresh / refresh-source) / exit codes / 3 examples / honest-scope note. Also added one row to the command-classification summary table at the top
  • docs/cheat-sheet.{md,en.md} — one row mirroring the guard row pattern (subcommands + most-common flags + help link)
  • docs/migration-toolkit-installation.{md,en.md} — Path B "Static binary download" updated with a second 6-row table for da-batchpr binaries (linux/darwin/windows × amd64/arm64) alongside da-guard. Currently-included table extended with da-batchpr row. C-11 release.yaml's existing for BIN in da-guard da-batchpr cross-compile loop already produces these archives (PR #131); now the install guide tells customers about them
  • 20 new tests (tests/ops/test_batchpr_dispatch.py, -race -count=2 style) — help / 3 subcommands accepted / unknown subcommand error / binary resolution (--da-batchpr-binary explicit + equals-form + missing) / env var binary / PATH search / passthrough preserves subcommand + flags / apply-specific flag set / exit code passthrough (3 cases) / FileNotFoundError + OSError during exec
  • Tool count 124 → 125 synced across CLAUDE.md / README.md / tool-map.{md,en.md}

  • Honest scope discipline：JSON-input-first contract preserved (convenience flags --base-merged-sha N etc. still deferred — separate polish PR). The Python wrapper is intentionally narrow: validate subcommand, resolve binary, forward args verbatim. Why bundle: doing 5 separate "wire da-batchpr into surface X" PRs would be silly fragmentation; the unit is "ship the customer-facing CLI integration that PR #131 honestly deferred"

  • Phase .c — C-10 Batch PR Pipeline PR-5 — da-batchpr CLI (apply / refresh / refresh-source)（v2.8.0） — turns the C-10 family from "Go library" into a customer-runnable Go binary. Closes the C-10 軌道 (PR-1 planner / PR-2 apply / PR-3 refresh-after-base-merged / PR-4 refresh-after-source-rule-fix → PR-5 CLI surface that wires them all together).

  • cmd/da-batchpr/ (new Go binary, 4 source files + 4 test files) — subcommand dispatcher + 3 verbs:
    • da-batchpr apply --plan plan.json --emit-dir ./emit/ --repo owner/name --workdir ./repo — opens or updates tenant chunk PRs from a Plan + C-9 emit output. CLI walks --emit-dir recursively and calls batchpr.AllocateFiles(plan, files) to bucket per-PlanItem before invoking batchpr.Apply()
    • da-batchpr refresh --input refresh.json --workdir ./repo — runs batchpr.Refresh() (PR-3 mode: rebase tenant branches after Base PR merges)
    • da-batchpr refresh-source --input refresh-source.json --patches-dir ./patches --workdir ./repo — runs batchpr.RefreshSource() (PR-4 mode: data-layer hot-fix patches into existing branches). CLI walks <patches-dir>/<pr-number>/ per target and populates the Files map
  • Stable exit codes：0 clean / 1 per-target failures (or refresh conflicts) / 2 caller error (bad flags, missing/invalid path, IO failure, JSON parse error). Mirrors the da-guard contract for CI script consistency
  • JSON-input-first contract：each subcommand's primary input is a JSON file (or stdin via --input -); reports + machine-readable results write to file (--report / --result-json) or stdout. The smart parts (parse + cluster + emit + cross-ref) live above batchpr in C-8 / C-9 and the Python da-tools wrapper; convenience flags (e.g. --base-merged-sha for refresh) deferred to a future CLI-polish PR
  • Testable architecture (cmdX → runX split)：each subcommand has a production dispatcher (cmdApply/cmdRefresh/cmdRefreshSource) that parses flags + constructs production clients (ShellGitClient + GHPRClient), and a testable core (runApply etc.) that takes injected batchpr.GitClient+batchpr.PRClient. Tests pass minimal stub clients; production main wires shell-out impls
  • Apply report renderer (renderApplyReport) — written inline in apply.go (NOT in batchpr package) to avoid expanding PR-2's ApplyResult shape. Mirrors the Refresh / RefreshSource report layout: header → summary counts → per-item table → warnings
  • build.sh + Dockerfile — da-batchpr bundled into the da-tools Docker image at /usr/local/bin/da-batchpr alongside da-guard. build.sh runs go build ./cmd/da-batchpr for linux/amd64 before docker build; cleanup rm -f happens after build succeeds
  • release.yaml cross-compile matrix — extended from "6 da-guard binaries" to "12 binaries (6 da-guard + 6 da-batchpr)" via a for BIN in da-guard da-batchpr outer loop. SHA256SUMS includes both.   • Phase .c — C-10 Batch PR Pipeline PR-3 — refresh --base-merged mode (Rebase Hell solver)（v2.8.0） — closes the auto-rebase loop after a Base Infrastructure PR merges. Without PR-3, the M tenant chunk PRs C-10 PR-2 opened against pre-merge main now show their diff as if it includes the Base PR's _defaults.yaml content (already in main!) — reviewers can't distinguish what's new from what's already-merged. PR-3 walks the tenant PR list in batch, rebases each branch onto the merged main HEAD, force-pushes-with-lease, and posts a "rebased onto merged Base PR" comment so reviewers see the refresh happened.

  • Refresh() orchestration (internal/batchpr/refresh.go) — same architectural pattern as Apply(): per-target pipeline (GetPR → state check → RebaseOnto → ForcePushWithLease → CommentPR), per-target failure isolation (one bad PR doesn't sink the batch), context-cancellation aware, optional inter-call delay for GitHub secondary rate-limit softening
  • State-aware skip logic — closed/merged tenant PRs surface as RebaseSkippedClosed (no rebase attempted; reviewer's intent already executed). PostCommentOnSkipped flag lets callers post a courtesy "skipped (PR closed)" comment if their workflow needs the audit trail
  • Conflict handling — RebaseOnto on conflict: git status --porcelain parsed for conflicted-file list, git rebase --abort runs to leave working tree clean, RebaseOutcome.Conflicted=true returned. Orchestration records RebaseConflicts status with ConflictedFiles populated; tenant PR is left untouched (no force-push, no comment) so the reviewer can do the manual rebase. Generated refresh-report.md includes a Conflicts section listing files per PR + suggested manual git rebase --onto command
  • GitClient interface extended — RebaseOnto(ctx, branch, oldBase, newBase) (*RebaseOutcome, error) + ForcePushWithLease(ctx, branch) error. Conflicts are an outcome, not an interface error — the orchestration distinguishes "rebase couldn't even start" (network / repo missing) from "started but conflicts emerged"
  • PRClient interface extended — GetPR(ctx, num) (*PRDetails, error) returning {Number, State, HeadBranch, URL} with normalised PRState (open/closed/merged/unknown — merged distinct from closed so Refresh can tell success from abandonment) + CommentPR(ctx, num, body) for the success / skip notes
  • Production shell-out impls：ShellGitClient.RebaseOnto runs git fetch origin → git checkout <branch> → git rebase --onto <newBase> <oldBase> <branch>, parses conflicts via git status --porcelain, aborts cleanly. ShellGitClient.ForcePushWithLease uses --force-with-lease (refuses to overwrite remote work landed since fetch — safer than plain --force). GHPRClient.GetPR shells gh pr view <num> --json number,state,headRefName,url with state upper-case→lower-case normalisation. GHPRClient.CommentPR shells gh pr comment <num> --body <body>
  • refresh-report.md markdown generator — header (repo / Base PR / merge SHA / mode) + summary counts + per-PR table (PR number, branch, state, status, notes) + Conflicts section with suggested manual commands + Warnings section. Always populated, even for empty Targets (logs "no PRs needed refresh; refresh is a no-op" so a scheduled cron job's output is audibly meaningful)

  • Phase .c — C-9 Profile Builder PR-4：accept/reject decisions filter（v2.8.0） — adds the human-in-the-loop primitive that ADR-019 §non-goals defers to a reviewer. Keeps the emission pipeline pure-Go (no UI dependency) by treating the accept/reject decision as a small YAML file the emitter can scaffold and re-consume:

  • ProposalDecision + ProposalDecisions types (internal/profile/decisions.go) — one row per cluster carrying decision: accept|reject|pending plus reviewer-cross-reference fields (member_rule_ids, summary, free-form note). File-level undecided_policy: emit|skip controls how proposals with no decision (or pending verdict) get treated
  • ExtractionProposal.Key() stable identifier — SHA-256 over SharedExprTemplate || \x00 || sorted MemberRuleIDs. Stable across runs as long as cluster identity is stable; shifts when members enter/leave or expression normalisation changes (and the emitter warns when a recorded decision references a now-stale key)
  • ScaffoldDecisions(set) → *ProposalDecisions — builds an all-pending starter file from a ProposalSet. Defensive-copies MemberRuleIDs so caller mutation can't leak into the scaffold
  • ParseDecisions / EncodeDecisions — YAML byte-level codec, deterministic output, header comment explaining edit conventions, empty input tolerated (returns empty struct rather than error)
  • EmissionInput.Decisions filter (nil = backward compat) — EmitProposals skips rejected proposals, emits accepted ones, applies the policy to undecided/pending. Pre-existing PR-2/PR-3 callers see ZERO behaviour change. Member-list drift (recorded vs live) and stale keys (decision references a cluster no longer in the set) surface as warnings without overriding the verdict
  • EmissionInput.EmitDecisionsScaffold flag — when true, drops a proposal-decisions.yaml at RootPrefix's root alongside per-proposal artifacts so reviewers see the file format up-front
  • Duplicate-key + unknown-verdict surfacing — copy-paste edits / typos warn rather than silently let the last entry win or fall through. Gives reviewers a chance to fix decisions before the next emit

Per-step failure becomes ApplyStatusFailed with descriptive error message; subsequent items still attempted (one bad tenant doesn't sink the batch). Context-cancellation aware.   • Idempotency via deterministic branch hashing — branch name = <prefix>/(base|tenant-<chunk-key>)-<plan-hash> where plan-hash is SHA-256[:8] of {Kind, SourceProposalIndices, ChunkKey, TenantIDs} per item (Title / Description excluded so rendering drift doesn't change the hash). Re-running Apply() against the same Plan + remote sees existing branches and records ApplyStatusSkippedExisting rather than duplicating PRs. Customer-renamed BranchPrefix honored
  • Interface split — IO at the edges — GitClient (CreateBranch / WriteFiles / Commit / Push / BranchExistsRemote) and PRClient (OpenPR / FindPRByBranch / UpdatePRDescription) interfaces decouple orchestration from side effects.   • Phase .c — C-9 Profile Builder PR-3 — PromRule→threshold translator + ADR-019（v2.8.0） — closes the C-9 emission gap that PR-2 honestly punted: PR-2 shipped intermediate-format artifacts (shared_expr_template, dialect, etc.) but the threshold-exporter runtime needs defaults: {<metric_key>: <numeric>} shape. PR-3 adds the bridge:

  • internal/profile/translate.go — pure Go translator. TranslateRule(ParsedRule) → RuleTranslation walks the metricsql AST to find a top-level numeric comparison (>, >=, <, <=), pulls out the threshold scalar, and resolves a metric_key via the 5-step ladder pinned in ADR-019: explicit metric_key label → alert name snake_case → record name snake_case → inner metric name → skipped. Inverted forms (0.85 < x) auto-flip to canonical metric op threshold. Equality operators (==/!=) are an explicit non-goal — surface as TranslationSkipped with a clear reason
  • TranslateProposal(prop, members, tenantKey) cluster aggregator — applies per-rule translation, picks majority for metric_key / operator / severity, takes the median of member thresholds for default_threshold (resists outliers — single tenant with 5000 won't pull a 80→1700 mean disaster). Per-tenant overrides only emitted for members whose value diverges from cluster default. Status==TranslationOK requires all axes unanimous + every member translated cleanly; otherwise downgrades to Partial with dissent warnings written into _defaults.yaml header comment + PROPOSAL.md. Cluster with zero translatable members → Skipped → caller falls back to PR-2 intermediate emission
  • emit.go::EmissionInput.Translate flag — caller opts in. false (default) preserves PR-2 backwards-compat. true enables per-proposal dispatch: TranslationOK/Partial → conf.d-shape (defaults: + per-tenant tenants: blocks), TranslationSkipped → intermediate format. Per-proposal granularity means a mixed easy/hard customer corpus still gets maximum value — translatable clusters land conf.d-ready, others surface for human review without sinking the batch
  • Conf.d-shape emission details：_defaults.yaml carries defaults: {<metric_key>: <numeric>} with a header comment block (provenance + dialect + translation status + warnings) so reviewers see soft spots inline. Per-tenant <id>.yaml carries tenants: {<id>: {<metric_key>: "<value>"}} with the threshold quoted as a string (matches config_resolve.go::ResolveAt's value:severity parser; severity-tier translation is an explicit non-goal of PR-3). Tenants matching cluster default get NO override file — the GitOps line-savings ADR-019 §1 promises
  • ADR-019 (slim) — Profile-as-Directory-Default — docs/adr/019-profile-as-directory-default.md (zh + .en.md) 釘死跨組件「default vs override 邊界」原則：cluster median in _defaults.yaml；只有偏離 default 的 tenant 寫 <id>.yaml override。影響 C-9 emission / C-10 directory placement / C-12 guard / C-11 packaging 共四處的一致性。Cross-component non-goals 列明：directory inference 延 C-10 PR-3 / dim+regex labels emission / source PromRule auto-rewrite / two-tier severity。Translator 演算法細節（metric_key 5-step ladder、median、cluster aggregation、operator handling、status fallback）寫在 internal/profile/translate.go package header，避免 ADR + code doc 雙寫漂移。ADR README index + cross-ref to ADR-017/018 同步

  • Phase .c — C-12 Dangling Defaults Guard PR-2 — Routing schema guardrails (v2.8.0) — 給 PR-1 落地的 internal/guard/ 加 routing-schema 檢查。Scope redirect 從 planning spec：planning §C-12 layer (ii) 寫的是「routing tree cycle detection + orphaned route」，但 codebase 實際 _routing model 是 flat per-tenant block (一 receiver + optional overrides[]，無 cross-references) → cycles 結構上不可能、orphans 在嚴格意義上不存在。實作 cycle detector 純屬 theatre。本 PR 改 ship 對此 model 真正能抓 bug 的 5 項檢查：

  • Unknown receiver type (error) — receiver.type 不在 {webhook, email, slack, teams, rocketchat, pagerduty}。Source of truth: scripts/tools/_lib_constants.py::RECEIVER_TYPES (Python/Go 共用)
  • Missing required receiver field (error) — 每 type 有自己的 required fields (webhook→url、slack→api_url、email→to+smarthost、pagerduty→service_key、teams→webhook_url、rocketchat→url)。Empty-string 也算 missing (mirror generate_alertmanager_routes.py 的 truthy check)
  • Empty override matcher (error) — override 沒任何 matcher field (alertname/metric_group/severity/component/db_type/environment) → 會 shadow ALL alerts，幾乎肯定是 bug
  • Duplicate override matcher (warn) — 兩 overrides 同 matcher fingerprint → 第二條死碼。Canonical fingerprint 用 encoding/json (sorted keys) + SHA-256，order-independent
  • Redundant override receiver (warn) — override 的 receiver 與 main receiver 結構完全相同 → override 無路由效果
  • 新 CheckInput.RoutingByTenant field — map[tenantID]map[string]any，caller 預先解析 _routing payload。維持 PR-1 的 zero-dep on YAML/merge engine 設計 — guard package 仍只吃 map[string]any
  • 新 5 個 FindingKind：unknown_receiver_type / missing_receiver_field / empty_override_matcher / duplicate_override_matcher / redundant_override_receiver
  • 21 new top-level tests (44 total guard tests, 含 PR-1 的 22) — 五 check 各自 happy/sad path、6 個 receiver type all accepted、empty-string 判 missing、matcher order-independence、nil-tenant skip、failing tenant 算入 PassedTenantCount drop。-race -count=3 穩定 1.0s；full suite -race 5.6s 無 regression

  • Phase .c — C-10 Batch PR Pipeline planner PR-1 (v2.8.0) — 新 components/threshold-exporter/app/internal/batchpr/ package：消費 C-9 ProposalSet → 產出 ordered Plan (一個 Base Infrastructure PR + N 個 tenant chunk PRs)。Pure planner — 零 git ops、零 GitHub API、零 disk write。Phase .c 整鏈 (C-8 → C-9 → C-10) 第四環，定義 input contract 給後續 PR-2 (apply mode) 對齊：

  • Hierarchy-Aware chunking (planning §C-10 + risk #13)：所有 _defaults.yaml 變更 → 單一 [Base Infrastructure PR]；個別 tenant 變更按 ChunkBy 分組 → 每個 tenant PR 帶 Blocked by: <base> placeholder marker (PR-2 取代成 #<actual-pr-num>)
  • 三種 ChunkBy 策略：ChunkByDomain (default，第一 path segment 分組，安全；review 邊界對齊 domain ownership) / ChunkByRegion (前兩 segments，更細) / ChunkByCount (固定大小 N，當 domain/region 分組產生 lopsided buckets 時用)。Soft cap — ChunkSize (default 25) 對 domain/region buckets 切 sub-chunks (<key>/part-NN)，oversized domain 不會炸 review
  • PlanInput contract — Proposals: []ProposalRef (profile.ExtractionProposal 的 slim subset，避免 batchpr 直接耦合 profile package) + TenantDirs: map[string]string (caller 提供 tenant→conf.d/-relative dir，planner 不從 filesystem 推斷) + ChunkBy + ChunkSize。Tenant 在 proposal 但不在 TenantDirs → Plan.Warnings (skip from chunking but surface)，不 fatal — 讓 caller iterative refine TenantDirs 不損其餘 plan
  • PlanItem 兩 Kind：PlanItemBase 首項 / PlanItemTenant 後續按 chunk 順序。每 item 含 Title (穩定生成 — base: [Base Infrastructure] Import N profiles (prom+metricsql) / tenant: [chunk i/N] Import PromRules to <chunk-key>) + Description (Markdown PR body) + BlockedBy + SourceProposalIndices (反查 PlanInput.Proposals 用，refresh / rollback flow 必需) + TenantIDs + ChunkKey
  • Determinism guarantees — bucket iteration sorted by key、TenantIDs sorted、tenant items 按 chunk i/N 順序、TestBuildPlan_DeterministicOutput 用 JSON byte-identical 兩次跑 lock；TestBuildPlan_SourceProposalIndicesMapBackToInput 守關 source-proposal back-pointer 正確性
  • Plan.Markdown() — GitHub-Flavored Markdown 渲染：summary 計數區、warnings 區 (有才出)、items apply-order table、per-item 完整 PR description。Future CLI da-tools batch-pr plan stdout 用 / C-3/C-4 UI preview pane embed 用

  • Phase .c — C-9 Profile Builder scaffolding PR-1 (v2.8.0) — 新 components/threshold-exporter/app/internal/profile/ package：消費 C-8 PR-1 的 parser.ParsedRule[]，跑 cluster engine 產出 ExtractionProposal[]（「這 N 條 rule 結構相同，可萃取出 _defaults.yaml」的提案），是 Phase .c 「禁止 50 份 tenant.yaml 拷貝」承諾的計算核心：

  • BuildProposals(rules, opts) 純函式（cluster.go）— 單 pass 演算法：每條 rule 算 signature = (normalised expr, for, dialect) → bucket by signature → bucket size ≥ MinClusterSize (default 2) emit ExtractionProposal；下限不足的 rule 與 ambiguous-with-empty-expr 落 Unclustered
  • Dialect 在 signature 內 — prom-dialect 與 metricsql-dialect 即使表面相同也永不同 cluster，因為 portability 語義不同；C-9 emission step (PR-2) 必須尊重此邊界
  • Label partitioning — 每 cluster 取 union(labels) → 每 key 在所有 member 同值 → SharedLabels（候選 _defaults.yaml 內容），其餘 → VaryingLabelKeys（必留 per-tenant override）
  • Determinism guarantees — bucket iteration sorted by signature；MemberRuleIDs 內 sorted；VaryingLabelKeys sorted；Proposals output 按 MemberRuleIDs[0] sorted；同 input 兩次跑 encoding/json byte-identical（單測有 lock）
  • Expression normalisation（normalize.go）— 三步：numericLiteral → <NUM>、quotedString → "<STR>"、whitespace 全部移除。讓 > 1 與 >1 與 > 1 三種寫法 collapse 成同 signature；同時保留 identifier 內的數字（http_requests_total_5xx 不會被誤砍）；不同 fn name (rate vs irate) 永不 collapse
  • EstimatedYAMLLineSavings — back-of-envelope (N-1) × shared_field_lines；UI surface 顯示「萃取此 Profile 預計省 YY 行」
  • ConfidenceHigh only in PR-1 — PR-1 只走 identical-signature exact match；medium/low confidence (fuzzier matching) 預留 PR-2/PR-3

    • --amend、exit codes 0/1/2 語意、保留 exec bit、best-effort .git/index 同步
